title: tephroseris helenitis subsp. candida
intro: Tephroseris helenitis subsp. candida, also known as snowy mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and promote a healthy immune system. In herbal preparations, tephroseris helenitis subsp. candida is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
